sanskrit:
तस्माद्यस्य महाबाहो निगृहीतानि सर्वशः।
इन्द्रियाणीन्द्रियार्थेभ्यस्तस्य प्रज्ञा प्रतिष्ठिता॥
transliteration:
tasmād yasya mahā-bāho nigṛhītāni sarvaśaḥ
indriyāṇīndriyārthebhyas tasya prajñā pratiṣṭhitā
literal_meaning: Therefore, O mighty-armed, whose senses are everywhere restrained from their objects, his intelligence is firmly established.
contextual_meaning: True mental steadiness arises when sensory cravings are systematically disengaged from their targets, allowing executive cognition to operate without hijack by impulse.
psychological_state: Pre-frontal cortex dominance over limbic reactivity; secure attachment to internal values rather than external stimuli.
trigger_scenario: Scrolling social media at 1 a.m., feeling the itch to click ‘buy now’ on an item you don’t need—pausing, putting the phone down, and going to sleep instead.
anchor_text: Pull your senses back, and your mind stands unshaken.
